# Seed idea — Focus Timer

A focus timer app for ADHD founders and indie builders who struggle to stay on task during deep work sessions.

The core insight: most timers are passive. This one should actively coach the user — noticing when they've context-switched, surfacing a one-line reminder of what they were doing, and celebrating streaks without adding anxiety.

Target users: solo founders with ADHD, early-stage indie builders, knowledge workers who work alone without external accountability.

Use this idea as input to `/vision`. Do not add assumptions about features or technology.
